description: A service planner needs to group scheduled bus trips into daily work assignments (runs) for drivers, optimizing for efficiency and adherence to labor rules.

nodes.task_description: Import the master schedule of all bus trips for a specific day.

expected_outcome.value: All required trips are loaded into the planning tool.

nodes.task_description: Define constraints, such as maximum run time, minimum break time, and other labor agreement rules.

expected_outcome.value: All labor constraints are correctly configured.

nodes.task_description: Run the optimization engine to automatically group trips into efficient runs.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates a set of proposed runs that covers all trips.

nodes.task_description: Review the proposed runs, make manual adjustments as needed, and finalize the run cut for drivers to bid on.

expected_outcome.value: A final, efficient set of driver work assignments is created.
